title: pasania synbalanos
side_effects: Pasania synbalanos can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues in some individuals. Prolonged or excessive consumption of Pasania synbalanos extracts may lead to stomach ulcers, digestive problems, and liver damage. In severe cases, improper use of the plant may result in seizures, convulsions, and even coma, highlighting the importance of careful dosage and medical supervision. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using Pasania synbalanos for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
